## ESTRUTURA

| 02 | LEVEL 1 - FB Ad Basics | Core FB ad skills (overlaps with FATC) |

| Camada | Count | Highlights |
|--------|-------|-----------|
| L1 Philosophies | 10 | Mindset is differentiator, never promise results, competence before clients |
